nodes.name: AbstractResourceServiceMessageSource.java
nodes.summary: Abstract base class for resource-backed ServiceMessageSource implementations managing message lifecycle from resource files. Provides initialization, validation with code prefix checks, resource loading per locale, and localized message retrieval with logging.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses synchronized blocks for thread-safe resource initialization and volatile field for cache visibility.

nodes.name: AbstractResourceServiceMessageSource
nodes.summary: Abstract base class extending AbstractServiceMessageSource that manages resource-localized message maps. Handles resource initialization, message code resolution with prefix validation, and provides template method hooks for subclass resource loading.

nodes.name: getInternalMessage
nodes.summary: Resolves a message by looking up the resolved code in the locale-specific messages map, applying pattern arguments via resolveMessage, and logging the result.

nodes.name: getResources
nodes.summary: Builds an unmodifiable set of resource names by resolving each supported locale's resource path. Used during initialization to enumerate all resources that need loading.

nodes.name: PropertiesResourceServiceMessageSource.java
nodes.summary: Abstract extension of AbstractResourceServiceMessageSource that loads i18n messages from Java .properties files. Provides Properties-based message loading with I/O error handling and unmodifiable result wrapping.

nodes.name: PropertiesResourceServiceMessageSource
nodes.summary: Abstract class bridging AbstractResourceServiceMessageSource to Java Properties loading. Provides loadMessages implementation that delegates to loadAllProperties, and exposes public loadAllProperties methods for testing and runtime access.

nodes.name: loadMessages
nodes.summary: Loads messages from a resource by reading properties, converting them to an unmodifiable map. Returns empty map on null or handles IOException by wrapping in RuntimeException.

nodes.name: loadAllProperties
nodes.summary: Loads Properties from a resource by reading all properties resources via Reader, merging them into a single Properties object. Returns null if no resources found.

nodes.name: ReloadableResourceServiceMessageSource.java
nodes.summary: Interface extending ResourceServiceMessageSource that defines contract for runtime reloading of i18n message resources. Provides default methods for canReload and reload delegation.

nodes.name: ReloadableResourceServiceMessageSource
nodes.summary: Interface defining the reload contract for resource-based service message sources. Supports both single resource and bulk reload with conditional canReload checks before reloading.

nodes.name: I18nEndpoint.java
nodes.summary: Spring Boot Actuator endpoint ('/actuator/i18n') providing read and write operations for i18n message management. Supports listing all localized messages, querying messages by code and locale, and adding new messages at runtime via property source manipulation.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Spring Boot @Endpoint with @ReadOperation and @WriteOperation annotations. Manages in-memory MapPropertySource for dynamic message addition.

nodes.name: I18nEndpoint
nodes.summary: Spring Boot Actuator @Endpoint exposing i18n messages via REST. Provides invoke() to list all messages, getMessage() to query by code and locale, and addMessage() to dynamically add messages through Spring Environment property sources.

nodes.name: invoke
nodes.summary: ReadOperation that collects and returns all localized resource messages from all resource ServiceMessageSources as a unified map keyed by resource name.

nodes.name: getMessage
nodes.summary: ReadOperation that queries a message across all resource sources and supported locales, returning a list of structured maps with code, locale, source, resource, and message fields.

nodes.name: addMessage
nodes.summary: WriteOperation that dynamically adds a message to a PropertySourcesServiceMessageSource by loading existing properties, adding the new code-message pair, and updating the environment's MapPropertySource.

nodes.name: I18nEndpointAutoConfiguration.java
nodes.summary: Spring Boot auto-configuration that registers the I18nEndpoint Actuator bean when Spring Boot Actuator is available and i18n is enabled. Guards bean creation with ConditionalOnAvailableEndpoint and ConditionalOnMissingBean.

nodes.name: I18nEndpointAutoConfiguration
nodes.summary: Auto-configuration class that conditionally creates an I18nEndpoint bean when the Actuator endpoint is available and i18n support is enabled.

nodes.name: I18nAutoConfiguration.java
nodes.summary: Core Spring Boot auto-configuration that enables i18n support and registers an application-specific ServiceMessageSourceFactoryBean keyed by spring.application.name. Activated when the i18n enabled property is true (default).

nodes.name: I18nAutoConfiguration
nodes.summary: Auto-configuration annotated with @ConditionalOnI18nEnabled and @EnableI18n that creates an application-specific ServiceMessageSourceFactoryBean using the Spring application name as the i18n source identifier.

nodes.name: ConditionalOnI18nEnabled.java
nodes.summary: Custom Spring Boot @Conditional annotation that activates i18n configuration only when both the i18n core and spring modules are on the classpath and the 'microsphere.i18n.enabled' property is true (defaulting to true if absent).

nodes.name: I18nEndpointTest.java
nodes.summary: Integration test for I18nEndpoint covering the invoke, getMessage, and addMessage operations. Validates JSON path structure, locale handling, multi-source message aggregation, and edge cases like missing sources.

nodes.name: I18nEndpointTest
nodes.summary: SpringBootTest-based test class that validates I18nEndpoint's invoke, getMessage with code/locale parameters, and addMessage write operations using JsonPath assertions.

nodes.name: I18nEndpointAutoConfigurationTest.java
nodes.summary: Auto-configuration test for I18nEndpointAutoConfiguration using ApplicationContextRunner. Verifies that the I18nEndpoint bean is created only when the Actuator endpoint is exposed and not disabled via properties.

nodes.name: I18nEndpointAutoConfigurationTest
nodes.summary: Test using ApplicationContextRunner to verify conditional bean creation for I18nEndpoint based on management endpoint exposure and enabled property settings.

nodes.name: I18nServerConfiguration.java
nodes.summary: Spring Cloud Server configuration that discovers services via DiscoveryClient and builds PropertySourcesServiceMessageSource instances for each service. Creates a lazy CompositeServiceMessageSource populated on ApplicationStartedEvent.

nodes.name: I18nServerConfiguration
nodes.summary: Configuration class importing I18nServerController that uses DiscoveryClient to build PropertySourcesServiceMessageSource per discovered service and populates a lazy CompositeServiceMessageSource on application start.

nodes.name: onApplicationStartedEvent
nodes.summary: Event listener that initializes the lazy CompositeServiceMessageSource by discovering services via DiscoveryClient and building a PropertySourcesServiceMessageSource for each service.

nodes.name: I18nServerController.java
nodes.summary: Spring Cloud REST controller exposing a GET /messages endpoint that returns all localized i18n messages by delegating to the I18nEndpoint Actuator.

nodes.name: I18nServerController
nodes.summary: @RestController that provides a /messages endpoint to retrieve all i18n localized resource messages through the I18nEndpoint Actuator.

nodes.name: I18nCloudAutoConfiguration.java
nodes.summary: Spring Cloud auto-configuration that enables dynamic reloading of i18n messages on environment changes. Imports ReloadableResourceServiceMessageSourceListener and registers HasFeatures for monitoring via Spring Cloud Actuator.

nodes.name: I18nCloudAutoConfiguration
nodes.summary: Auto-configuration activated when spring-cloud-context is on the classpath and i18n is enabled. Imports FeaturesConfiguration and ReloadableResourceServiceMessageSourceListener for environment change-driven message reloading.

nodes.name: FeaturesConfiguration
nodes.summary: Nested configuration class that creates a HasFeatures bean listing all PropertySourcesServiceMessageSource instances as NamedFeatures for Spring Cloud Actuator monitoring.

nodes.name: ReloadableResourceServiceMessageSourceListener.java
nodes.summary: ApplicationListener for Spring Cloud EnvironmentChangeEvent that triggers dynamic reloading of all PropertySourcesServiceMessageSource beans when environment properties change (e.g., via /actuator/refresh).

nodes.name: ReloadableResourceServiceMessageSourceListener
nodes.summary: ApplicationListener implementing BeanFactoryAware that receives EnvironmentChangeEvent and delegates to PropertySourcesServiceMessageSource.reloadAll for dynamic message source reloading.

nodes.name: I18nCloudAutoConfigurationTest.java
nodes.summary: Auto-configuration test for I18nCloudAutoConfiguration using ApplicationContextRunner. Verifies that ReloadableResourceServiceMessageSourceListener bean is present when environment change events are available and absent when filtered out.

nodes.name: I18nCloudAutoConfigurationTest
nodes.summary: Test class using ApplicationContextRunner to validate conditional bean creation for ReloadableResourceServiceMessageSourceListener, including negative tests with classloader filtering.

nodes.name: MessageSourceIntegrationTest.java
nodes.summary: Integration test verifying that i18n messages are dynamically reloaded when EnvironmentChangeEvent fires with changed property keys. Validates end-to-end flow from property change to message source reload.

nodes.name: MessageSourceIntegrationTest
nodes.summary: Integration test that verifies dynamic message source reloading by adding a MapPropertySource to the environment, publishing an EnvironmentChangeEvent, and asserting the updated message is returned.

nodes.name: PropertySourcesServiceMessageSource.java
nodes.summary: Spring-integrated ServiceMessageSource that loads i18n messages from Environment property sources instead of files. Supports runtime reloading triggered by property changes and provides static utility methods for finding and reloading all PropertySourcesServiceMessageSource beans.
nodes.languageNotes: Implements EnvironmentAware for Spring Environment injection. Uses static utility methods with varargs Predicate for flexible bean filtering.

nodes.name: PropertySourcesServiceMessageSource
nodes.summary: Extends PropertiesResourceServiceMessageSource with Spring Environment integration, implementing ReloadableResourceServiceMessageSource. Loads message properties from Spring Environment property sources and provides static methods for bulk finding and reloading across all beans.

nodes.name: findAllPropertySourcesServiceMessageSources
nodes.summary: Static method that filters a collection of ServiceMessageSource instances to only PropertySourcesServiceMessageSource type and applies optional Predicate filters. Returns empty list if input is empty.

nodes.name: reloadAll
nodes.summary: Static method that finds all PropertySourcesServiceMessageSource beans, determines which resources changed based on property names, and triggers reload for those that can be reloaded.

nodes.name: I18nAutoConfigurationTests.java
nodes.summary: Integration test for I18nAutoConfiguration verifying that the Spring Boot auto-configuration registers all expected i18n beans including ServiceMessageSourceFactoryBean, MessageSourceAdapter, and related post-processors.

nodes.name: I18nAutoConfigurationTests
nodes.summary: Test class that uses ApplicationContextRunner to validate the I18nAutoConfiguration registers all required i18n Spring beans.

nodes.name: shouldContainServiceMessageSourceFactoryBean
nodes.summary: Verifies that the auto-configured context contains all expected i18n beans including applicationServiceMessageSource, DelegatingServiceMessageSource, MessageSourceAdapter, I18nApplicationListener, and bean post-processors.

nodes.name: EnableI18n.java
nodes.summary: Annotation that enables Spring i18n support by importing I18nImportBeanDefinitionRegistrar, allowing configuration of message sources and optional MessageSource exposure through annotation attributes.
nodes.languageNotes: Creates a Spring @Import-driven annotation that bootstraps i18n bean registration.

nodes.name: I18nImportBeanDefinitionRegistrar.java
nodes.summary: ImportBeanDefinitionRegistrar that conditionally registers all i18n Spring beans (ServiceMessageSourceFactoryBean, DelegatingServiceMessageSource, MessageSourceAdapter, lifecycle listeners, and conditional bean post-processors) when @EnableI18n is present and the i18n feature is enabled.

nodes.name: I18nImportBeanDefinitionRegistrar
nodes.summary: Central bean registrar that processes @EnableI18n attributes and conditionally registers ServiceMessageSource beans, DelegatingServiceMessageSource, MessageSourceAdapter, I18nApplicationListener, and post-processors for validation and web locale resolution.

nodes.name: registerBeanDefinitions
nodes.summary: Main registration entry point that checks if i18n is enabled, then delegates to sub-methods to register ServiceMessageSource, MessageSourceAdapter, I18nApplicationListener, and bean post-processor definitions.

nodes.name: registerServiceMessageSourceBeanDefinitions
nodes.summary: Resolves source names from annotation attributes and Spring properties, registers a ServiceMessageSourceFactoryBean for each source, and creates a primary DelegatingServiceMessageSource bean that composites all source beans.

nodes.name: registerBeanPostProcessorBeanDefinitions
nodes.summary: Conditionally registers ServiceMessageSourceBeanLifecyclePostProcessor, and optionally registers I18nLocalValidatorFactoryBeanPostProcessor and AcceptHeaderLocaleResolverBeanPostProcessor based on classpath availability.

nodes.name: setEnvironment
nodes.summary: Injects the Spring Environment to enable property-based resolution of i18n source names and the enabled/disabled flag.

nodes.name: isEnabled
nodes.summary: Checks the 'microsphere.i18n.enabled' Spring property to determine whether i18n feature registration should proceed, defaulting to enabled.

nodes.name: ServiceMessageSourceBeanLifecyclePostProcessor.java
nodes.summary: MergedBeanDefinitionPostProcessor that automatically configures init and destroy method names on ServiceMessageSource bean definitions, delegating to Spring's lifecycle interfaces when applicable.

nodes.name: ServiceMessageSourceBeanLifecyclePostProcessor
nodes.summary: Post-processor that examines each merged bean definition for ServiceMessageSource types and assigns init/destroy method names if not already configured and the bean does not implement InitializingBean/DisposableBean.

nodes.name: postProcessMergedBeanDefinition
nodes.summary: Entry point for the MergedBeanDefinitionPostProcessor that checks if a bean definition is assignable to ServiceMessageSource and triggers init/destroy method name configuration.

nodes.name: setInitMethodName
nodes.summary: Sets the 'init' method name on the bean definition if the bean does not implement InitializingBean and no init method is already configured.

nodes.name: setDestroyMethodName
nodes.summary: Sets the 'destroy' method name on the bean definition if the bean does not implement DisposableBean and no destroy method is already configured, respecting Spring's INFER_METHOD convention.

nodes.name: I18nConstants.java
nodes.summary: Constants interface defining Spring configuration property names for the i18n framework including enabled flag, sources, default locale, supported locales, and the primary bean name.

nodes.name: I18nConstants
nodes.summary: Interface containing all Spring configuration property constants for i18n including enabled property, sources, default locale, and supported locales, documented with @ConfigurationProperty annotations.

nodes.name: I18nApplicationListener.java
nodes.summary: Application event listener that initializes the global ServiceMessageSource on context refresh, destroys it on context close, and reloads sources on property changes.

nodes.name: I18nApplicationListener
nodes.summary: Listens for ContextRefreshedEvent, ContextClosedEvent, and PropertySourcesChangedEvent to manage ServiceMessageSource lifecycle and reload i18n sources dynamically.

nodes.name: onContextRefreshedEvent
nodes.summary: Handles ContextRefreshedEvent by extracting the ApplicationContext and initializing the global ServiceMessageSource from it.

nodes.name: onContextClosedEvent
nodes.summary: Handles ContextClosedEvent by destroying the global ServiceMessageSource to clean up resources.

nodes.name: onPropertySourcesChangedEvent
nodes.summary: Handles PropertySourcesChangedEvent by reloading affected ServiceMessageSource instances whose configuration properties have changed.

nodes.name: MessageSourceAdapter.java
nodes.summary: Spring MessageSource adapter that delegates message resolution to a ServiceMessageSource and falls back to other MessageSource beans in the application context for default messages.

nodes.name: MessageSourceAdapter
nodes.summary: Implements Spring's MessageSource interface by wrapping a ServiceMessageSource and aggregating fallback MessageSource beans, with SmartInitializingSingleton for late binding of fallback sources.

nodes.name: MessageSourceAdapter
nodes.summary: Constructor accepting the ServiceMessageSource to wrap and initializing the fallback MessageSource list.

nodes.name: getMessage(code,args,defaultMessage,locale)
nodes.summary: Resolves a message by code from the ServiceMessageSource and falls back to default message sources if no message is found.

nodes.name: getMessage(resolvable,locale)
nodes.summary: Resolves a message from a MessageSourceResolvable by iterating through its message codes until a non-null message is found.

nodes.name: afterSingletonsInstantiated
nodes.summary: Collects all non-self MessageSource beans from the BeanFactory after all singletons are instantiated, building the fallback chain for default message resolution.

nodes.name: I18nLocalValidatorFactoryBeanPostProcessor.java
nodes.summary: BeanPostProcessor that associates the i18n MessageSourceAdapter with Spring's LocalValidatorFactoryBean to enable internationalized validation error messages.

nodes.name: I18nLocalValidatorFactoryBeanPostProcessor
nodes.summary: Extends GenericBeanPostProcessorAdapter to intercept LocalValidatorFactoryBean initialization and set the i18n MessageSourceAdapter as its validation message source.

nodes.name: isValidatorFactoryPresent
nodes.summary: Checks whether jakarta.validation.ValidatorFactory is on the classpath to conditionally enable validation i18n support.

nodes.name: AcceptHeaderLocaleResolverBeanPostProcessor.java
nodes.summary: BeanPostProcessor that configures Spring MVC's AcceptHeaderLocaleResolver with the default locale and supported locales from the ServiceMessageSource configuration.

nodes.name: AcceptHeaderLocaleResolverBeanPostProcessor
nodes.summary: Extends GenericBeanPostProcessorAdapter and ApplicationContextAware to inject i18n-configured default and supported locales into each AcceptHeaderLocaleResolver bean.

nodes.name: processAfterInitialization
nodes.summary: Post-processes an AcceptHeaderLocaleResolver by setting its default locale and supported locales from the ServiceMessageSource configuration.

nodes.name: isAcceptHeaderLocaleResolverPresent
nodes.summary: Checks whether AcceptHeaderLocaleResolver is on the classpath to conditionally enable web locale i18n support.

nodes.name: I18nImportBeanDefinitionRegistrarTest.java
nodes.summary: Comprehensive test for I18nImportBeanDefinitionRegistrar covering source-specified, disabled, unexposed message source, and absent bean class scenarios in a Spring application context.

nodes.name: I18nImportBeanDefinitionRegistrarTest
nodes.summary: Test class with four test methods validating bean registration behavior under different @EnableI18n configurations including enabled, disabled, unexposed MessageSource, and absent validation/web classes.

nodes.name: testOnSpecifiedSources
nodes.summary: Verifies that when sources are specified, all expected i18n beans (ServiceMessageSourceFactoryBean, MessageSourceAdapter, ServiceMessageSource, I18nApplicationListener, post-processors) are present in the context.

nodes.name: testOnDisabled
nodes.summary: Verifies that when i18n is disabled via configuration, none of the i18n beans are registered in the application context.

nodes.name: testOnUnexposedMessageSource
nodes.summary: Verifies that when exposeMessageSource is false, ServiceMessageSource beans are still registered but MessageSourceAdapter is not exposed as the Spring MessageSource.

nodes.name: testOnBeanClassAbsent
nodes.summary: Verifies that when validation and web classes are not on the classpath, the conditional post-processors (I18nLocalValidatorFactoryBeanPostProcessor, AcceptHeaderLocaleResolverBeanPostProcessor) are not registered.

nodes.name: DisabledEnableI18nConfiguration.java
nodes.summary: Test configuration class annotated with @EnableI18n and a ResourcePropertySource that sets microsphere.i18n.enabled=false, used to verify the disabled behavior of i18n bean registration.

nodes.name: UnexposedMessageSourceEnableI18nConfiguration.java
nodes.summary: Test configuration class annotated with @EnableI18n(exposeMessageSource = false) used to verify i18n bean registration without exposing the MessageSourceAdapter as the Spring MessageSource.

nodes.name: I18NLocalValidatorFactoryBeanPostProcessorTest.java
nodes.summary: Test for I18nLocalValidatorFactoryBeanPostProcessor covering scenarios without LocalValidatorFactoryBean, without MessageSourceAdapter, and verifying that the message interpolator is set correctly.

nodes.name: I18NLocalValidatorFactoryBeanPostProcessorTest
nodes.summary: Test class validating the I18nLocalValidatorFactoryBeanPostProcessor behavior when LocalValidatorFactoryBean is absent, MessageSourceAdapter is not available, and when both are present and correctly wired.

nodes.name: AbstractServiceMessageSource.java
nodes.summary: Abstract base implementation of ServiceMessageSource providing locale management, message code resolution, hierarchical locale resolution, and delegating message retrieval for concrete subclasses.

nodes.name: CompositeServiceMessageSource.java
nodes.summary: Composite implementation of ReloadableResourceServiceMessageSource that delegates message resolution across a prioritized list of child ServiceMessageSource instances, returns the first non-null result.

nodes.name: ServiceMessageException.java
nodes.summary: Runtime exception that resolves localized messages via MessageUtils, supporting message pattern codes like {messageCode} for dynamic i18n error messages.

nodes.name: ServiceMessageSource.java
nodes.summary: Core service interface for internationalized message resolution defining the contract for getting messages by code and locale, with default methods for common locale and source handling.

nodes.name: I18nUtils.java
nodes.summary: Global static accessor and utility class for the ServiceMessageSource singleton, with recursive discovery of leaf sources within CompositeServiceMessageSource hierarchies.

nodes.name: MessageUtils.java
nodes.summary: Message pattern resolution utility that extracts i18n message codes from {code} patterns and resolves them through the global ServiceMessageSource, with fallback to the original pattern when no translation is found.

nodes.name: I18nEndpointAutoConfigurationBootstrap.java
nodes.summary: Spring Boot test bootstrap application that starts a servlet-based container with EnableAutoConfiguration and registers a test ServiceMessageSourceFactoryBean for endpoint integration testing.

nodes.name: DelegatingServiceMessageSource.java
nodes.summary: Spring-aware delegating CompositeServiceMessageSource that auto-discovers all ServiceMessageSource beans in the BeanFactory and delegates to them as the primary message source bean.

nodes.name: ServiceMessageSourceFactoryBean.java
nodes.summary: Spring FactoryBean that creates and manages ServiceMessageSource instances from SpringFactoriesLoader configuration, resolving default and supported locales from environment properties, and reloading on ResourceServiceMessageSourceChangedEvent.

nodes.name: I18nBeanUtils.java
nodes.summary: Spring bean utility class for retrieving i18n-related beans (MessageSource, MessageSourceAdapter, ServiceMessageSource) from a BeanFactory with proper type casting and null safety.

nodes.name: ServiceMessageSourceBeanLifecyclePostProcessorTest.java
nodes.summary: JUnit 5 test for ServiceMessageSourceBeanLifecyclePostProcessor verifying that init/destroy method names are correctly set on RootBeanDefinition for ServiceMessageSource and DelegatingServiceMessageSource bean types.

nodes.name: I18nBeanUtilsTest.java
nodes.summary: JUnit 5 test for I18nBeanUtils verifying message source bean retrieval in various Spring container configurations including exposed adapters and disabled i18n setups.

nodes.name: AbstractServiceMessageSource
nodes.summary: Abstract base class implementing ServiceMessageSource with locale management, hierarchical locale resolution, message code prefixing, and configurable default/supported locales for concrete subclasses.

nodes.name: getMessage
nodes.summary: Resolves and retrieves an internationalized message by code and locale, performing message code resolution, locale resolution (with fallback to language-only locale), and internal message lookup.

nodes.name: resolveHierarchicalLocales
nodes.summary: Expands a collection of supported locales into a hierarchical set including both region-specific and language-only locale variants for locale fallback resolution.

nodes.name: CompositeServiceMessageSource
nodes.summary: Composite implementation that aggregates multiple ServiceMessageSource instances and delegates message, locale, and resource operations across them, supporting reload and initialization lifecycle methods.

nodes.name: getMessage
nodes.summary: Iterates through composited ServiceMessageSource instances and returns the first non-null message for the given code and locale.

nodes.name: setServiceMessageSources
nodes.summary: Sets and sorts the composited ServiceMessageSource list by priority, replacing the previous sources list and cleaning up old references.

nodes.name: reload
nodes.summary: Reloads changed resources across all composited ReloadableResourceServiceMessageSource instances that can handle the given resource changes.

nodes.name: getSupportedLocales
nodes.summary: Aggregates all supported locales from composited sources into a unified set, falling back to parent interface defaults when empty.

nodes.name: ServiceMessageException
nodes.summary: Runtime exception that stores a message pattern and arguments, resolving localized messages through MessageUtils for i18n-aware error reporting.

nodes.name: toString
nodes.summary: Returns a detailed string representation including the class name, original message, arguments array, and the localized message resolved via MessageUtils.

nodes.name: ServiceMessageSource
nodes.summary: Core interface defining the service internationalization contract with methods for message resolution, locale handling, lifecycle management, and source identification.

nodes.name: I18nUtils
nodes.summary: Abstract utility class providing global static access to a ServiceMessageSource singleton, with recursive leaf-source discovery within composite hierarchies and lifecycle management.

nodes.name: serviceMessageSource
nodes.summary: Returns the global ServiceMessageSource singleton, falling back to EmptyServiceMessageSource with a warning if not initialized.

nodes.name: initServiceMessageSources
nodes.summary: Recursively traverses a ServiceMessageSource tree, extracting leaf (non-composite) sources from CompositeServiceMessageSource wrappers into a flat list.

nodes.name: MessageUtils
nodes.summary: Utility class that resolves message patterns in {code} format to localized messages via the global ServiceMessageSource, with locale-specific resolution and fallback to the original pattern.

nodes.name: getLocalizedMessage
nodes.summary: Resolves a message pattern to a localized string by extracting the message code from {code} braces, querying the ServiceMessageSource, and falling back to the pattern itself or a source-stripped code.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses {code} pattern syntax with dot-separated source prefixes for scoped message resolution.

nodes.name: I18nEndpointAutoConfigurationBootstrap
nodes.summary: Spring Boot test bootstrap class with EnableAutoConfiguration that starts a servlet container and registers a test ServiceMessageSourceFactoryBean for manual endpoint verification.

nodes.name: DelegatingServiceMessageSource
nodes.summary: Spring bean that extends CompositeServiceMessageSource, auto-discovers all ServiceMessageSource beans from the BeanFactory, and serves as the primary delegating message source for the application context.

nodes.name: ServiceMessageSourceFactoryBean
nodes.summary: Spring FactoryBean that instantiates ServiceMessageSource implementations from SpringFactoriesLoader, initializes them with environment-configured locales, and handles resource change events for hot reload.

nodes.name: initServiceMessageSources
nodes.summary: Loads AbstractServiceMessageSource implementations from Spring factories, instantiates them with the configured source name, applies locale settings, and sorts by priority.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses SpringFactoriesLoader for SPI-like service discovery with reflection-based constructor invocation.

nodes.name: resolveDefaultLocale
nodes.summary: Reads the default locale from Spring Environment configuration property, falling back to the system default locale when the property is not set.

nodes.name: resolveSupportedLocales
nodes.summary: Reads the supported locales list from Spring Environment configuration property, parsing locale strings and falling back to defaults when the property is not set.

nodes.name: I18nBeanUtils
nodes.summary: Utility class providing static methods to retrieve Spring i18n beans (MessageSource, MessageSourceAdapter, ServiceMessageSource) from a BeanFactory with null-safe access.

nodes.name: ServiceMessageSourceBeanLifecyclePostProcessorTest
nodes.summary: JUnit 5 test class that verifies the post-processor correctly injects init/destroy method names into RootBeanDefinition for various ServiceMessageSource bean types.

nodes.name: testPostProcessMergedBeanDefinition
nodes.summary: Parameterized test that verifies init/destroy method injection for ServiceMessageSource, DelegatingServiceMessageSource, and plain Object bean types across multiple override scenarios.

nodes.name: I18nBeanUtilsTest
nodes.summary: JUnit 5 test class that validates I18nBeanUtils message source retrieval behavior across different Spring configuration scenarios with and without EnableI18n.

nodes.name: ResourceServiceMessageSource.java
nodes.summary: Interface extending ServiceMessageSource that defines resource initialization lifecycle methods and configurable character encoding for i18n message sources.

nodes.name: ResourceServiceMessageSource
nodes.summary: Interface exposing resource initialization (initializeResource, initializeResources), tracking of initialized resources via getInitializedResources, and default UTF-8 encoding configuration.

nodes.name: ResourceServiceMessageSourceChangedEvent.java
nodes.summary: Spring ApplicationContextEvent published when i18n resource files are modified at runtime, carrying the set of changed resource paths for reactive message source reloading.

nodes.name: ResourceServiceMessageSourceChangedEvent
nodes.summary: Event class extending ApplicationContextEvent that encapsulates the set of changed i18n resource file paths for triggering runtime message source reload in the Spring context.

nodes.name: AbstractSpringTest.java
nodes.summary: Abstract base test class providing JUnit 5 lifecycle hooks for locale setup and teardown along with a shared assertion helper for verifying ServiceMessageSource message resolution.

nodes.name: AbstractSpringTest
nodes.summary: Abstract test class that sets Simplified Chinese as default locale before all tests, resets LocaleContextHolder before each test, cleans up after all tests, and provides assertGetMessage helper for verifying message code resolution and null handling.

nodes.name: assertGetMessage
nodes.summary: Asserts that a ServiceMessageSource correctly resolves Simplified Chinese messages for a simple code, a parameterized code with arguments, and returns null for a missing code.

nodes.name: PropertySourcesServiceMessageSourceTest.java
nodes.summary: Test class verifying PropertySourcesServiceMessageSource with 10 test methods covering resource initialization from Spring Environment, reload capability detection, bean discovery in various Spring container configurations, and resource/property name lookups.

nodes.name: PropertySourcesServiceMessageSourceTest
nodes.summary: Test class extending AbstractSpringTest with 10 test methods that exercise PropertySourcesServiceMessageSource initialization, reload capability with populated/empty resource sets, bean scanning in no-bean/single/delegating container configurations, and resource/property name retrieval.

nodes.name: testCanReload
nodes.summary: Tests that PropertySourcesServiceMessageSource.canReload returns true for populated resource sets and false for empty or non-resource-based configurations.

nodes.name: EnableI18nTest.java
nodes.summary: Test class verifying the EnableI18n annotation correctly bootstraps a ServiceMessageSource bean with working message resolution and singleton identity behavior.

nodes.name: EnableI18nTest
nodes.summary: Test class with testGetMessage and testCommonServiceMessageSource methods that validate the EnableI18n annotation produces a working ServiceMessageSource with correct message resolution and singleton behavior.

nodes.name: testGetMessage
nodes.summary: Tests that the ServiceMessageSource bootstrapped by EnableI18n correctly resolves messages and returns null for missing message codes.

nodes.name: ServiceMessageSourceFactoryBeanTest.java
nodes.summary: Comprehensive test class for ServiceMessageSourceFactoryBean with 11 test methods covering message resolution, locale handling, supported locales, event-driven reload via ResourceServiceMessageSourceChangedEvent, ordering, and toString behavior.

nodes.name: ServiceMessageSourceFactoryBeanTest
nodes.summary: Test class extending AbstractSpringTest with 11 test methods that exercise the full ServiceMessageSourceFactoryBean API: message retrieval, locale resolution with context reset, default/supported locales, source access, ordering, locale resolution from environment, event-driven reload, and toString.

nodes.name: testGetMessage
nodes.summary: Tests ServiceMessageSourceFactoryBean message resolution including standard lookups, null for missing codes, and reactive reload when a ResourceServiceMessageSourceChangedEvent is published with updated property values.

nodes.name: testGetLocale
nodes.summary: Tests locale resolution from both ServiceMessageSource and ServiceMessageSourceFactoryBean across default locale, custom locale setting, LocaleContextHolder reset, and fallback to system default.

nodes.name: testResolveSupportedLocale
nodes.summary: Tests ServiceMessageSourceFactoryBean.resolveDefaultLocale with default environment configuration and a custom MockEnvironment that overrides the locale property.

nodes.name: testResolveSupportedLocales
nodes.summary: Tests ServiceMessageSourceFactoryBean.resolveSupportedLocales with default environment and a custom MockEnvironment that configures supported locales via a Spring property.

nodes.name: TestSourceEnableI18nConfiguration.java
nodes.summary: Spring @Configuration class annotated with @EnableI18n(sources = "test") that enables i18n for the test message source, used as a shared configuration in Spring integration test contexts.

nodes.name: TestSourceEnableI18nConfiguration
nodes.summary: Marker @Configuration class that activates i18n support for the test source via @EnableI18n annotation, designed for reuse across multiple Spring integration test classes to avoid duplicating configuration.

nodes.name: I18nApplicationListenerTest.java
nodes.summary: Test class verifying I18nApplicationListener behavior including ServiceMessageSource singleton identity and reactive message reloading triggered by PropertySourcesChangedEvent publication.

nodes.name: I18nApplicationListenerTest
nodes.summary: Test class that validates ServiceMessageSource singleton identity verification, message resolution before and after PropertySourcesChangedEvent with updated property sources, and message update after property changes.

nodes.name: test
nodes.summary: Tests that ServiceMessageSource is retrieved as the same singleton from context, reacts to PropertySourcesChangedEvent by reloading messages from updated property sources, and correctly reflects property changes in message resolution.

nodes.name: AcceptHeaderLocaleResolverBeanPostProcessorTest.java
nodes.summary: Test class verifying AcceptHeaderLocaleResolverBeanPostProcessor correctly propagates supported locales from ServiceMessageSource to AcceptHeaderLocaleResolver beans in the Spring container.

nodes.name: AcceptHeaderLocaleResolverBeanPostProcessorTest
nodes.summary: Test class with test and localeResolver @Bean factory method that validates AcceptHeaderLocaleResolverBeanPostProcessor correctly sets supported locales from ServiceMessageSource onto the resolver bean.

nodes.name: localeResolver
nodes.summary: Bean factory method that creates an AcceptHeaderLocaleResolver instance for use in the Spring test context configuration, enabling the bean post processor to configure supported locales from ServiceMessageSource.

nodes.name: DefaultServiceMessageSource.java
nodes.summary: Default implementation of ServiceMessageSource that loads i18n property resources from classpath locations under META-INF/i18n/{source}/, with reloadable resource support via ClassLoader resolution.

nodes.name: EmptyServiceMessageSource.java
nodes.summary: No-op implementation of ServiceMessageSource that always returns null for any message code, used as a fallback or singleton placeholder in the i18n framework.

nodes.name: AbstractI18nTest.java
nodes.summary: Abstract test base class that sets Simplified Chinese as the default locale and cleans up the ServiceMessageSource before and after each test method.

nodes.name: I18nUtilsTest.java
nodes.summary: Test class for I18nUtils that verifies singleton service message source retrieval, setting, and recursive discovery of all ServiceMessageSource instances from a CompositeServiceMessageSource.

nodes.name: MessageUtilsTest.java
nodes.summary: Test class for MessageUtils that validates message pattern constants and localized message resolution with various argument combinations across Chinese and English locales.

nodes.name: DelegatingServiceMessageSourceTest.java
nodes.summary: Test class for DelegatingServiceMessageSource that verifies it returns null for unresolvable message codes when no matching bean is available in the Spring container.

nodes.name: MessageSourceAdapterTest.java
nodes.summary: Test class for MessageSourceAdapter that validates message resolution with and without a backing MessageSource bean, covering code-based, default-message, and MessageSourceResolvable lookups in the Spring container.

nodes.name: DefaultServiceMessageSource
nodes.summary: Extends PropertiesResourceServiceMessageSource and implements ReloadableResourceServiceMessageSource to load i18n property files from classpath using a configurable location pattern, with ClassLoader-driven resource enumeration.

nodes.name: EmptyServiceMessageSource
nodes.summary: Singleton no-op ServiceMessageSource implementation that returns null for all message codes, providing a safe default when no real message source is configured.

nodes.name: AbstractI18nTest
nodes.summary: Abstract JUnit 5 test base that sets the default locale to Simplified Chinese before all tests and destroys the ServiceMessageSource singleton before and after each test.

nodes.name: I18nUtilsTest
nodes.summary: Test class extending AbstractI18nTest that validates I18nUtils singleton operations and recursive ServiceMessageSource discovery from CompositeServiceMessageSource.

nodes.name: MessageUtilsTest
nodes.summary: Test class extending AbstractI18nTest that validates MessageUtils constants and getLocalizedMessage behavior across Chinese and English locales with various message patterns.

nodes.name: MessageSourceAdapterTest
nodes.summary: Test class extending AbstractSpringTest that validates MessageSourceAdapter message resolution with Spring bean-backed and no-bean scenarios, including MessageSourceResolvable and fallback defaults.

nodes.name: loadAllPropertiesResources
nodes.summary: Enumerates all classpath URL resources matching the given resource name, opens each as an InputStreamReader with the configured encoding, and collects them into a list for property loading.

nodes.name: testGetLocalizedMessage
nodes.summary: Tests localized message resolution with patterns including plain text, message code templates, source-qualified codes, and fallback behavior across Simplified Chinese and English locales.

nodes.name: testOnNoMessageSourceBean
nodes.summary: Tests that MessageSourceAdapter returns null for code-only lookups, falls back to the default message, and resolves MessageSourceResolvable with default message when no backing MessageSource bean exists.

nodes.name: test
nodes.summary: Tests MessageSourceAdapter with a fully configured DefaultServiceMessageSource bean, verifying code lookups, default message fallback, MessageSourceResolvable resolution, and handling of unresolvable codes.

nodes.name: maven-build.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that builds and tests the Maven project on push or pull request targeting main, dev, or release branches, running against a matrix of Java 17, 21, and 25 with multiple Spring Cloud profiles.

nodes.name: build
nodes.summary: Main job that checks out source, sets up Java with Maven cache, runs the Maven build with test and coverage profiles across Java version and Spring Cloud profile matrix, and uploads coverage reports to Codecov.

nodes.name: maven-publish.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that publishes the Maven artifact to Maven Central via OSS Sonatype, creates a GitHub release with auto-generated release notes using GitHub Models API, increments the patch version, and merges the release branch back into main.
nodes.languageNotes: Complex multi-job workflow with Python inline script calling GitHub Models (gpt-4o) for AI-generated release notes.

nodes.name: build
nodes.summary: Validates the version format, checks out source, sets up Maven Central credentials, and publishes the package to OSS Sonatype using Maven deploy with GPG signing secrets.

nodes.name: release
nodes.summary: Creates a git tag, generates AI-powered release notes via GitHub Models API, creates a GitHub release, bumps the POM revision to the next snapshot version, commits the change, and merges release into main.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Python inline script to call gpt-4o via GitHub Models API for release note generation.

nodes.name: merge-main-to-branches.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that automatically merges the main branch into dev and release branches whenever changes are pushed to main, using a matrix strategy to handle each target branch.

nodes.name: merge-to-branch
nodes.summary: Checks out the repository with full history and performs a no-fast-forward merge of main into each target branch (dev, release) with automated error handling for conflicts.

nodes.name: sync-branches-from-upstream.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that syncs all branches in a fork from the upstream repository, running on push to main/dev branches or every 5 minutes via schedule, with safeguards to avoid overwriting fork-ahead branches.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses GitHub API via gh CLI to detect fork status and upstream repository, with concurrency control to prevent overlapping sync runs.

nodes.name: sync
nodes.summary: Checks whether the repository is a fork via the GitHub API, then iterates all branches and syncs each one from upstream using force-with-lease, skipping branches that do not exist upstream or are ahead of upstream.

nodes.name: wiki-publish.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that generates project documentation pages from Java source code using a Python script, then publishes the rendered Markdown to the GitHub Wiki repository on pushes to main or manual trigger.

nodes.name: generate-wiki
nodes.summary: Checks out the source repository, runs the Python wiki generation script to produce Markdown pages, checks out or initializes the wiki repository, copies generated pages, and pushes any changes to the wiki.

nodes.name: create-readme.prompt.md
nodes.summary: Agentic prompt template for generating a comprehensive README.md file covering project description, setup instructions, and contribution guidelines using GitHub Flavored Markdown.

nodes.name: document-api.prompt.md
nodes.summary: Agentic prompt template for generating OpenAPI 3.0.3 YAML specifications from API endpoint code, including path definitions, parameter schemas, response schemas, and reusable components.

nodes.name: explain-code.prompt.md
nodes.summary: Concise agentic prompt template for generating beginner-friendly code explanations with step-by-step breakdowns, key concept definitions, and practical usage examples.

nodes.name: generate-unit-tests.prompt.md
nodes.summary: Agentic prompt template for generating focused unit tests covering core functionality, input validation, error handling, and side effects following the AAA pattern with configurable target function and testing framework.

nodes.name: onboarding-plan.prompt.md
nodes.summary: Agentic prompt template for creating a personalized phased onboarding plan covering foundation setup, codebase exploration with beginner-friendly tasks, and integration into team processes.

nodes.name: review-code.prompt.md
nodes.summary: Agentic prompt template for performing comprehensive code reviews covering security, performance, code quality, architecture, testing, and documentation with structured severity-based feedback output.

nodes.name: CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md
nodes.summary: Contributor code of conduct adapted from the Contributor Covenant v1.3.0, outlining expected behaviors, reporting guidelines, and maintainer responsibilities for the project community.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Project overview and getting-started guide covering features, modules, setup instructions for Spring/Boot/Cloud applications, message file conventions, configuration properties, Actuator endpoint, and contribution guidelines.

nodes.name: developer-guide.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive developer guide detailing the architecture, class hierarchy, and module-by-module breakdown of all six microsphere-i18n modules with code examples and key concept explanations.

nodes.name: mvnw.cmd
nodes.summary: Apache Maven Wrapper startup script for Windows that downloads the configured Maven distribution, validates its SHA-256 checksum, extracts it, and invokes Maven commands.

nodes.name: pom.xml
nodes.summary: Parent POM for the microsphere-i18n multi-module project defining seven sub-modules, project metadata, SCM configuration, licensing information, and build properties targeting Java 17.

nodes.name: release-notes.md
nodes.summary: Cumulative release notes documenting changes across versions 0.2.4 through 0.2.11, including new features, dependency updates, bug fixes, and build workflow enhancements.

nodes.name: dependabot.yml
nodes.summary: Dependabot configuration for automated Maven dependency updates on this project, checking daily with a limit of 10 open pull requests.

nodes.name: generate-wiki-docs.py
nodes.summary: Wiki documentation generator that parses Java source files in the project and produces Markdown wiki pages for each public Java component, with Javadoc extraction, code examples, and version metadata.
nodes.languageNotes: Python script using regex-based parsing to extract Javadoc, class hierarchies, and method signatures from Java source files.

nodes.name: _read_java_versions
nodes.summary: Internal helper that reads Java version information from the project's .java-version file using regex.

nodes.name: _read_pom_revision
nodes.summary: Internal helper that extracts the revision version from the root pom.xml using regex search.

nodes.name: _read_pom_artifact_id
nodes.summary: Internal helper that reads the artifact ID from a module pom.xml file.

nodes.name: _read_readme_title
nodes.summary: Internal helper that extracts the first Markdown heading from a module's README file.

nodes.name: clean_javadoc_line
nodes.summary: Strips leading comment markers and whitespace from a raw Javadoc line.

nodes.name: parse_javadoc
nodes.summary: Parses raw Javadoc text to extract description, @since version, @author, @see references, and code examples.

nodes.name: convert_javadoc_to_markdown
nodes.summary: Converts Javadoc tags ({@link}, {@code}, {@value}, etc.) to equivalent Markdown syntax using regex substitution.

nodes.name: JavaComponent
nodes.summary: Data class representing a parsed Java component with its qualified name, type, package, and source file metadata.

nodes.name: JavaMethod
nodes.summary: Data class representing a parsed Java public method with its signature and Javadoc description.

nodes.name: parse_java_file
nodes.summary: Parses a single Java source file to extract package, class/interface/enum/annotation declarations, inheritance, imports, and Javadoc.

nodes.name: extract_public_methods
nodes.summary: Extracts public method signatures and their associated Javadoc from a Java class body.

nodes.name: generate_wiki_page
nodes.summary: Generates the full Markdown wiki page for a single Java component including badges, package info, description, and method tables.

nodes.name: generate_home_page
nodes.summary: Generates the wiki home page with module, package, and component listings organized by project structure.

nodes.name: generate_sidebar
nodes.summary: Generates the wiki sidebar with a module hierarchy navigation tree.

nodes.name: discover_java_files
nodes.summary: Walks module source directories to discover all Java source files.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Entry point that orchestrates the full wiki generation pipeline: discovers Java files, parses them, and writes per-component wiki pages plus home and sidebar.

nodes.name: maven-wrapper.properties
nodes.summary: Maven wrapper configuration specifying wrapper version 3.3.4 and the Apache Maven 3.9.15 distribution URL.

nodes.name: .understandignore
nodes.summary: Exclusion pattern file for the Understand-Anything codebase analysis tool, listing Java/Maven-specific file and directory globs to skip during scanning.

nodes.name: pom.xml
nodes.summary: Maven module descriptor for the core i18n library, bundling the foundational internationalization APIs with dependencies on microsphere-java-core and optional Jakarta Servlet and SLF4J APIs.

nodes.name: pom.xml
nodes.summary: Maven Bill of Materials (BOM) POM that manages versions for all microsphere-i18n submodules, providing unified dependency management across the project.

nodes.name: pom.xml
nodes.summary: Maven module descriptor for the OpenFeign integration module, depending on microsphere-i18n-core with optional Feign core and Spring WebMVC for Accept-Language header propagation.

nodes.name: AcceptLanguageHeaderRequestInterceptor.java
nodes.summary: Feign RequestInterceptor that propagates the Accept-Language header from the current Spring WebMVC HTTP request to outgoing Feign client requests for i18n support.

nodes.name: AcceptLanguageHeaderRequestInterceptor
nodes.summary: Implements feign.RequestInterceptor to copy the Accept-Language HTTP header from the current servlet request to Feign request templates, enabling locale propagation across service boundaries.

nodes.name: apply
nodes.summary: Extracts the Accept-Language header from the current servlet request attributes and forwards it onto the Feign RequestTemplate.

nodes.name: AcceptLanguageHeaderRequestInterceptorTest.java
nodes.summary: Test suite for AcceptLanguageHeaderRequestInterceptor covering standard header propagation, missing header, and non-WebMVC scenarios.

nodes.name: AcceptLanguageHeaderRequestInterceptorTest
nodes.summary: JUnit 5 test class with three test methods validating Accept-Language header forwarding behavior across normal, missing-header, and non-servlet scenarios.

nodes.name: pom.xml
nodes.summary: Parent Maven POM for all microsphere-i18n modules, importing microsphere-spring-cloud-dependencies BOM for unified version management.

nodes.name: pom.xml
nodes.summary: Maven module descriptor for the Spring Boot auto-configuration module, depending on microsphere-i18n-spring with optional Spring Boot autoconfigure and web starters.

nodes.name: pom.xml
nodes.summary: Maven module descriptor for the Spring Cloud Server module that exposes i18n messages via REST endpoints, depending on microsphere-i18n-spring-cloud with optional Spring Cloud Commons and Context.

nodes.name: EnableI18nServer.java
nodes.summary: Annotation to enable the I18n Server, importing I18nServerConfiguration via @Import and exposing a REST endpoint for serving internationalized messages from discovered services.

nodes.name: I18nServerBootstrap.java
nodes.summary: Test bootstrap application for the I18n Server, annotated with @SpringBootApplication, @EnableDiscoveryClient, and @EnableI18nServer to verify the server configuration.

nodes.name: I18nServerBootstrap
nodes.summary: Spring Boot application entry point for launching the I18n Server as a servlet-based web application during testing.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Launches the I18n Server Spring Boot application using SpringApplicationBuilder with servlet web type.

nodes.name: pom.xml
nodes.summary: Maven module descriptor for the Spring Cloud integration module, depending on microsphere-i18n-spring-boot and microsphere-spring-cloud-commons with optional Spring Cloud Commons.

nodes.name: pom.xml
nodes.summary: Maven module descriptor for the Spring integration module, depending on microsphere-i18n-core with optional Spring Context, WebMVC, and expression support.

nodes.name: mvnw
nodes.summary: Apache Maven Wrapper shell script that downloads and executes the configured Maven distribution, enabling reproducible builds without requiring a pre-installed Maven runtime.

nodes.name: set_java_home
nodes.summary: Resolves the Java runtime location from JAVA_HOME or PATH, handling Cygwin/MinGW path translation and verifying executables exist.

nodes.name: AutoConfiguration.imports
nodes.summary: Spring Boot 3.0+ auto-configuration registration file listing I18nAutoConfiguration and I18nEndpointAutoConfiguration for automatic discovery.

nodes.name: spring.factories
nodes.summary: Legacy Spring Boot auto-configuration registration file enabling I18nAutoConfiguration and I18nEndpointAutoConfiguration via the EnableAutoConfiguration key.

nodes.name: AbstractResourceServiceMessageSourceTest.java
nodes.summary: Tests that AbstractResourceServiceMessageSource throws IllegalArgumentException when initialize() is called without a valid source configuration, using a test subclass that stubs getResource() and loadMessages().

nodes.name: CompositeServiceMessageSourceTest.java
nodes.summary: Comprehensive test suite for CompositeServiceMessageSource covering delegation to child sources, locale resolution, reload behavior, resource initialization, encoding, and source management across both populated and empty composite instances.

nodes.name: DefaultServiceMessageSourceTest.java
nodes.summary: Tests DefaultServiceMessageSource functionality including message resolution with locale, resource initialization, message code validation, locale introspection, source identification, and reload capabilities against the test i18n resource bundle.

nodes.name: EmptyServiceMessageSourceTest.java
nodes.summary: Verifies that EmptyServiceMessageSource returns null for all message lookups, defaults to the JVM default locale, and identifies its source as "Empty" as a no-op message source implementation.

nodes.name: PropertiesResourceServiceMessageSourceTest.java
nodes.summary: Tests PropertiesResourceServiceMessageSource including loadMessages error handling, default locale assignment, and supported locales configuration with logging level assertions.

nodes.name: ReloadableResourceServiceMessageSourceTest.java
nodes.summary: Tests ReloadableResourceServiceMessageSource interface methods including single and batch resource reloading, and canReload state transitions before and after resource initialization.

nodes.name: ResourceServiceMessageSourceTest.java
nodes.summary: Tests ResourceServiceMessageSource interface methods for resource initialization tracking and default encoding (UTF-8) retrieval.

nodes.name: ServiceMessageExceptionTest.java
nodes.summary: Tests ServiceMessageException creation with localized message resolution, verifying the exception correctly reports both the raw message and the i18n-localized variant using the test resource bundle.

nodes.name: ServiceMessageSourceTest.java
nodes.summary: Base test class for ServiceMessageSource hierarchy, verifying core contract methods including message lookup defaults (null for unknown codes), locale resolution, source identification, and constants.

nodes.name: TestPropertiesResourceServiceMessageSource.java
nodes.summary: Test stub for PropertiesResourceServiceMessageSource that overrides getResource() to return an empty string and loadAllPropertiesResources() to throw IOException, enabling controlled testing of properties loading failure paths.

nodes.name: TestReloadableResourceServiceMessageSource.java
nodes.summary: Test stub implementing ReloadableResourceServiceMessageSource that delegates reload/canReload to the interface default methods and overrides canReload to check resource set membership for deterministic test assertions.

nodes.name: TestResourceServiceMessageSource.java
nodes.summary: Test stub implementing ResourceServiceMessageSource that tracks initialized resources in a LinkedHashSet, delegates resource initialization to the interface default, and returns a read-only view of tracked resources.

nodes.name: TestServiceMessageSource.java
nodes.summary: Test stub implementing ServiceMessageSource with no-op lifecycle methods, null-returning message lookups, and delegation to interface defaults for locale and source resolution.

nodes.name: i18n_messages_zh_CN.properties
nodes.summary: Chinese (Simplified) i18n resource bundle for the "error" source, providing test messages that validate error-sourced message resolution in the i18n framework.

nodes.name: i18n_messages_en.properties
nodes.summary: English i18n resource bundle for the "test" source with placeholder-based messages (test.a, test.hello) used by the core test suite for message resolution verification.

nodes.name: i18n_messages_zh_CN.properties
nodes.summary: Chinese (Simplified) i18n resource bundle for the "test" source with Chinese translations of test messages used to verify locale-aware message resolution.

nodes.name: application.properties
nodes.summary: Spring Boot test application configuration enabling the i18n management endpoint and exposing all Actuator web endpoints for the spring-boot module integration tests.

nodes.name: i18n_messages_en.properties
nodes.summary: Empty English i18n resource bundle placeholder for the "common" source in the spring-boot module, available for test message resolution.

nodes.name: i18n_messages_zh_CN.properties
nodes.summary: Empty Chinese (Simplified) i18n resource bundle placeholder for the "common" source in the spring-boot module, available for test message resolution.

nodes.name: i18n_messages_en.properties
nodes.summary: English i18n resource bundle for the "test" source in the spring-boot module, providing test messages for spring-boot integration test verification.

nodes.name: i18n_messages_zh_CN.properties
nodes.summary: Chinese (Simplified) i18n resource bundle for the "test" source in the spring-boot module, providing Chinese translations for spring-boot integration test verification.

nodes.name: I18nBootstrap.java
nodes.summary: Spring Cloud test bootstrap class annotated with @EnableAutoConfiguration that initializes the Spring application context with an overriding i18n property for the common source.

nodes.name: i18n-bootstrap.properties
nodes.summary: Spring Cloud bootstrap configuration setting the application name and enabling the i18n management endpoint with full Actuator web exposure for integration tests.

nodes.name: i18n_messages_en.properties
nodes.summary: Empty English i18n resource bundle placeholder for the "common" source in the spring-cloud module, available for test message resolution.

nodes.name: i18n_messages_zh_CN.properties
nodes.summary: Empty Chinese (Simplified) i18n resource bundle placeholder for the "common" source in the spring-cloud module, available for test message resolution.

nodes.name: AbstractResourceServiceMessageSourceTest
nodes.summary: Verifies that AbstractResourceServiceMessageSource.initialize() throws IllegalArgumentException when the source configuration is invalid, using an inner test subclass.

nodes.name: CompositeServiceMessageSourceTest
nodes.summary: Comprehensive test class covering all CompositeServiceMessageSource operations including message delegation, locale resolution, reload behavior, resource management, and source encoding with both populated and empty composites.

nodes.name: DefaultServiceMessageSourceTest
nodes.summary: Tests DefaultServiceMessageSource as the primary message source implementation, validating message lookup, locale handling, code resolution, resource loading, and reload interactions with the test resource bundle.

nodes.name: EmptyServiceMessageSourceTest
nodes.summary: Verifies the EmptyServiceMessageSource null-object pattern: all message lookups return null, locale defaults to system default, and source identifier is "Empty".

nodes.name: PropertiesResourceServiceMessageSourceTest
nodes.summary: Tests PropertiesResourceServiceMessageSource configuration methods including loadMessages error propagation, default locale assignment, and supported locales setup.

nodes.name: ReloadableResourceServiceMessageSourceTest
nodes.summary: Tests the ReloadableResourceServiceMessageSource contract: resource reload by single resource and iterable, and canReload state transitions from false to true after initial reload.

nodes.name: ResourceServiceMessageSourceTest
nodes.summary: Tests the ResourceServiceMessageSource contract: single resource initialization tracking and default encoding (UTF-8) retrieval.

nodes.name: ServiceMessageExceptionTest
nodes.summary: Tests ServiceMessageException which extends RuntimeException, verifying message formatting, localized message resolution from the i18n framework, and toString output format.

nodes.name: ServiceMessageSourceTest
nodes.summary: Base test class for the ServiceMessageSource hierarchy validating the core API contract: null returns for unknown message codes, locale and source defaults, and constants verification.

nodes.name: TestPropertiesResourceServiceMessageSource
nodes.summary: Test stub extending PropertiesResourceServiceMessageSource that stubs resource retrieval and forces IOException on properties loading for testing error handling paths.

nodes.name: TestReloadableResourceServiceMessageSource
nodes.summary: Test stub implementing ReloadableResourceServiceMessageSource with deterministic canReload logic based on resource set membership, used by CompositeServiceMessageSource and ReloadableResourceServiceMessageSource tests.

nodes.name: TestResourceServiceMessageSource
nodes.summary: Test stub implementing ResourceServiceMessageSource that tracks initialized resources in a LinkedHashSet and delegates to interface default methods for resource initialization and encoding.

nodes.name: TestServiceMessageSource
nodes.summary: Test stub implementing ServiceMessageSource with no-op lifecycle methods, null message lookup, and delegation to interface defaults for locale and source resolution. Root of the test-double hierarchy.

nodes.name: setUp
nodes.summary: JUnit BeforeEach method that initializes DefaultServiceMessageSource, TestReloadableResourceServiceMessageSource, and both populated and empty CompositeServiceMessageSource instances for each test.

nodes.name: testReload
nodes.summary: Verifies that both populated and empty CompositeServiceMessageSource instances can reload by single resource and by collection, then asserts reloaded state.

nodes.name: testGetInternalLocale
nodes.summary: Tests that the internal locale resolution matches the default locale when using an anonymous subclass that overrides getInternalLocale to return getDefaultLocale().

nodes.name: LocaleUtils.java
nodes.summary: Abstract utility class providing a single static method to retrieve the Locale from Spring's thread-local LocaleContext, used across the Spring-based i18n layer.

nodes.name: getLocaleFromLocaleContext
nodes.summary: Retrieves the active Locale from the current thread's LocaleContext via LocaleContextHolder, returning null if no context is set.

nodes.name: LocaleUtils
nodes.summary: Abstract utility class that prevents instantiation via a private constructor and exposes a single static helper for Locale extraction from Spring's LocaleContext.

nodes.summary: Spring Boot auto-configuration factories file registering PropertySourcesServiceMessageSource and DefaultServiceMessageSource as implementations of AbstractServiceMessageSource.
